message:
🐛 Wire isDemoData for all remaining cards across the entire console (#1908)

* 🐛 Wire isDemoData for all remaining cards across the entire console

Complete the isDemoData wiring so every card correctly shows the Demo
badge when displaying demo/sample data. Previously only 5 AI/ML cards
were fixed; this covers the remaining 89 cards console-wide.

Categories:
- 27 game/static cards: isDemoData: false (never use cluster data)
- 44 useMCP-backed cards: isDemoData: isDemoMode (via useDemoMode hook)
- 11 cards with existing useDemoMode: added isDemoData to useCardLoadingState
- 4 always-demo cards: isDemoData: true (GatewayStatus, ServiceExports, etc.)
- 3 external API cards: isDemoData: false (Weather, StockMarketTicker, NetworkUtils)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ci: trigger workflow re-evaluation with fixed pr-verifier

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
